title: Robust supply plan within a specified uncertainty set
prompt: A robust optimization model chooses supplier quantities that remain feasible for every demand vector in a budgeted uncertainty set. The set is a modeling choice and need not contain every future demand. Frame resilience and conservatism while stating this boundary clearly.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize procurement cost plus worst-case shortage penalty
constraints: robust demand coverage over the uncertainty set
model_specification.mechanism: Larger uncertainty budgets protect against more simultaneous deviations but generally require more costly advance capacity.
model_specification.uncertainty: demand vectors inside a budgeted set

fidelity_requirements: Guarantee applies only inside the set
prohibited_inferences: The plan is feasible for every conceivable future

evidence_needs.claim: The uncertainty set is calibrated to demand
